confidence.label: Low
confidence.description: Early or weak signal. Requires stronger confirmation before publication.

confidence.label: Medium
confidence.description: Relevant signal with some supporting context, but still needs editorial review.

confidence.label: High
confidence.description: Strongly supported by primary or reliable reference sources.

freshness.label: Recent
freshness.description: Still relevant and not stale for current defensive awareness.

freshness.label: Stale
freshness.description: Older item that may need re-checking before use.

severity_hint.label: High
severity_hint.description: Likely to require urgent attention if confirmed.

severity_hint.label: Medium
severity_hint.description: Potentially important but needs more context or review.

severity_hint.label: Watch
severity_hint.description: Worth monitoring, but not enough for stronger severity.
